caption: A man with a distinctive tall, grey, textured hairpiece and glasses is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a microphone. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and light-colored suspenders, and he wears black over-ear headphones. To his left is a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous small, framed photographs and some clothing items. On the left side of the scene, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," while another logo on the right repeats "BOSS TALK 101." Across the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, speaking with subtle changes in his facial expression and lip movements as he talks. The camera angle and lighting remain constant throughout the clip.
